overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through grassy highlands at night during a thunderstorm with visible lightning flashes illuminating the landscape.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark night in a rural highland area, with the camera following an armored character from behind as he walks along a winding dirt trail. Grassy banks rise on both sides of the path, with silhouetted pine trees visible in the distance against a stormy sky. The scene remains consistently dark until a bright lightning flash illuminates the landscape at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt trail curving through grassy highlands

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it curves gently through the terrain

segments.scene_description: Following the lightning flash, the scene returns to low light conditions as the character continues walking along the dirt trail. The path curves gently through the grassy landscape, and the pine trees on the left side of the frame draw closer, transitioning from distant silhouettes to mid-ground elements. The storm continues overhead as the character progresses along the winding route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, stormy highland landscape that is momentarily transformed by a sudden burst of light. It begins by trailing an armored character from behind as he walks along a winding dirt path flanked by grassy banks and distant, silhouetted pine trees. As the character progresses, a bright flash of lightning abruptly illuminates the entire rural environment, momentarily stripping away the shadows. The scene then returns to low light conditions as the camera continues to follow the figure along the curving trail, where the pine trees shift from distant shapes into more prominent mid-ground elements. The movement concludes with the character steadily advancing through the persistent storm along the winding route.
